'''鈭歳-l-j''' ('''karalaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zhuzh|zhuzh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zhuzh|zhuzh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-l-j
|-
! Lemma
| karalaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiralaj|thiralaj]] || [[word:jiralaj|jiralaj]] || [[word:shiralaj|shiralaj]] || [[word:kiralaj|kiralaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuralaj|thuthuralaj]] || [[word:jujuralaj|jujuralaj]] || [[word:shushuralaj|shushuralaj]] || [[word:kukuralaj|kukuralaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuralaj|thuralaj]] || [[word:juralaj|juralaj]] || [[word:shuralaj|shuralaj]] || [[word:kuralaj|kuralaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuralaj|thuralaj]] || [[word:juralaj|juralaj]] || [[word:shuralaj|shuralaj]] || [[word:kuralaj|kuralaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theralaj|theralaj]] || [[word:jeralaj|jeralaj]] || [[word:sheralaj|sheralaj]] || [[word:keralaj|keralaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoralaj|thothoralaj]] || [[word:jojoralaj|jojoralaj]] || [[word:shoshoralaj|shoshoralaj]] || [[word:kokoralaj|kokoralaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoralaj|thoralaj]] || [[word:joralaj|joralaj]] || [[word:shoralaj|shoralaj]] || [[word:koralaj|koralaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoralaj|thoralaj]] || [[word:joralaj|joralaj]] || [[word:shoralaj|shoralaj]] || [[word:koralaj|koralaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]] || [[word:ralaj|ralaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ralaj|th忙ralaj]] || [[word:j忙ralaj|j忙ralaj]] || [[word:sh忙ralaj|sh忙ralaj]] || [[word:k忙ralaj|k忙ralaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharalaj|thatharalaj]] || [[word:jajaralaj|jajaralaj]] || [[word:shasharalaj|shasharalaj]] || [[word:kakaralaj|kakaralaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharalaj|tharalaj]] || [[word:jaralaj|jaralaj]] || [[word:sharalaj|sharalaj]] || [[word:karalaj|karalaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharalaj|tharalaj]] || [[word:jaralaj|jaralaj]] || [[word:sharalaj|sharalaj]] || [[word:karalaj|karalaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharalaj|sharalaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharalaj|gosharalaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharalaj|gokisharalaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharalajn眉|sharalajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharalajnkn眉|gosharalajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharalajn眉|gokisharalajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharalajsh毛|sharalajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharalajnksh毛|gosharalajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharalajsh毛|gokisharalajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharalajro|sharalajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharalajnkro|gosharalajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharalajro|gokisharalajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharalajmu|sharalajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharalajnkmu|gosharalajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharalajmu|gokisharalajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharalajsher|sharalajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharalajnksher|gosharalajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharalajsher|gokisharalajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharalajng|sharalajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharalajnkng|gosharalajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharalajng|gokisharalajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharalajya|sharalajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharalajnkya|gosharalajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharalajya|gokisharalajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharalajyam|sharalajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharalajnkyam|gosharalajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharalajyam|gokisharalajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharalajn眉sh毛|sharalajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharalajnkn眉sh毛|gosharalajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharalajn眉sh毛|gokisharalajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharalajn眉ro|sharalajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharalajnkn眉ro|gosharalajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharalajn眉ro|gokisharalajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharalajn眉mu|sharalajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharalajnkn眉mu|gosharalajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharalajn眉mu|gokisharalajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharalajsh毛n眉|sharalajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharalajnksh毛n眉|gosharalajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharalajsh毛n眉|gokisharalajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharalajsh毛ro|sharalajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharalajnksh毛ro|gosharalajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharalajsh毛ro|gokisharalajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharalajsh毛mu|sharalajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharalajnksh毛mu|gosharalajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharalajsh毛mu|gokisharalajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharalajron眉|sharalajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharalajnkron眉|gosharalajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharalajron眉|gokisharalajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharalajrosh毛|sharalajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharalajnkrosh毛|gosharalajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharalajrosh毛|gokisharalajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharalajromu|sharalajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharalajnkromu|gosharalajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharalajromu|gokisharalajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharalajmun眉|sharalajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharalajnkmun眉|gosharalajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharalajmun眉|gokisharalajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharalajmush毛|sharalajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharalajnkmush毛|gosharalajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharalajmush毛|gokisharalajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharalajmuro|sharalajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharalajnkmuro|gosharalajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharalajmuro|gokisharalajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
